title: viola collina subsp. propera
intro: Viola collina subsp. propera, also known as the Alpine pansy or Violetta alpina, is a sub-species of the Viola collina plant, a type of flowering plant in the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola collina subsp. propera include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also sometimes dried and used as a herb in cooking and baking.
